hedge_objectives: protect cash flows from undue exposure to the risk of changing commodity prices
hedged_items: forecasted sales of production and basis
counterparty_credit_risk: OTC derivative instruments with financial institutions; credit exposure limited to positive fair value derivatives; monitoring of market conditions and counterparty credit fundamentals; credit approvals and limits; preference for investment grade counterparties; netting agreements and collateral obtained when possible
credit_rating_impact: Interest rates for EQT's revolving credit facility and EQT's 7.000% senior notes fluctuate based on changes to the credit ratings assigned to EQT's senior notes by Moody's, S&P and Fitch
